title: College oversight, improvement and intervention
body: "This guidance is for:   college governors accounting officers (CEOs and principals) chief financial officers governance professionals   It applies to:   further education (FE) colleges sixth-form colleges designated institutions   The guidance sets out:    how the Department for Education (DfE) works with colleges to:   identify any financial or quality issues provide tiered support take targeted action intervene where necessary    updates to our improvement and intervention policy, following:   the Post-16 education and skills white paper  introduction of Regional Improvement Teams (RITs) changes to the Ofsted inspection framework      This guidance supports the information provided on help and support for colleges.  "

taxons.title: Inspection and performance of further education providers
